svg.text: Candidate Fig. 5 asset pack: PAR1 control and autosomal PHR-compatible pedigree patches
Strict nb=1 sweepGA 1:1 no-scaffold primary path; axes are native assembly coordinates parsed from source names.
A PAR1 positive control: paternal chrX p maps to chrY p
Main chrYp block at chrX:12,265-155,863; strict nb=1 1:1 path; C15/C15.
Known male PAR1 X/Y recombination sanity check; not autosomal PHR evidence.
B PAN027 autosomal candidate: chr9 q terminal patch mostly chr3 q
Strict primary path switches near chr9:136,151,769; terminal tract is
mostly chr3q with small side fragments.
Candidate terminal PHR exchange patch; not a clean full crossover.
C Superseded PAN028 chr3q side-fragment strict path
Strict nb=1 path contains chr7p, chr16q h1, and chr20q h2 side
fragments; no strict chr9q donor is drawn.
Strict chr3q path shows chr7p, chr16q h1, and chr20q h2 side fragments only; not the preferred PAN028 PHR
Deliberately selected review set; not a genome-wide rediscovery run.
